title: fraxinus pennsylvanica f. aucubifolia
intro: Fraxinus pennsylvanica f. aucubifolia, also known as Green Ash, is a deciduous tree native to North America, belonging to the Oleaceae family. The bark and leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Fraxinus pennsylvanica f. aucubifolia include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
